dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal uses ADX for trend detection and Bollinger Bands for breakout confirmation. Entry conditions translated to breakouts from 20-period Bollinger Bands (bb_upper/bb_lower) with ADX confirmation. Exit triggers on ADX falling below 18. Stop loss set at 1.5x ATR equivalent (1.5% as decimal). Mean-reversion exit condition (price to MA) not directly translatable without additional logic; ADX exit captures regime shift. CONTEXT_DEPENDENT direction reflects the signal's emphasis on adapting position sizing to regime (trending=1.0x, ranging=0.5x).

backtest_rule.reason: Signal uses ADX for trend detection and Bollinger Bands for breakout confirmation. Entry conditions translated to breakouts from 20-period Bollinger Bands (bb_upper/bb_lower) with ADX confirmation. Exit triggers on ADX falling below 18. Stop loss set at 1.5x ATR equivalent (1.5% as decimal). Mean-reversion exit condition (price to MA) not directly translatable without additional logic; ADX exit captures regime shift. CONTEXT_DEPENDENT direction reflects the signal's emphasis on adapting position sizing to regime (trending=1.0x, ranging=0.5x).

source_rule_text: A trader should adjust market participation based on market regime (trending vs. sideways), since markets trend only 15-20% of the time and move sideways the rest of the time. Constant market participation without regime assessment leads to poor risk-adjusted returns.
